notes: On-device touch menu (brightness, calibrate, info, language), slide-to-power-off confirm screen, animated splash. Lean digit colors by warn zone, top-band stats split into duration/distance/speed icons, paused-ride visual, session-best PB badge, LOW BATT banner. Phone-language lock once you pick from the menu. Built on v2.0.8's deep-sleep-only power model. Reliability: touch I2C glitch debounce, battery PMU glitch guard, profile-change race fix.
